Off Calendar Mar-29-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Craig S. Miller, Esq. for plaintiff and moving party: Embarcadero Techonologies Inc.
Michael T. McKeeman, Esq. for defendant and opposing party: TTI Team Telecom International, Inc.

HEARING HELD and tentative ruling adopted: Plaintiff Embarcadero Technologies Inc. v. TTI Team Telecom International Inc., Application for right to attach order and writ of attachment.
The application for right to attach order and writ of attachment is granted. The undertaking is set in the amount of $10,000. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN.

Craig S. Miller, Esq. for plaintiff and moving party: Embarcadero Technologies Inc.
